1.description: Select parcel centroids (teig.representasjonspunkt) for parcels in Lillestrøm (kommunenummer filter)

2.description: Select quick-clay hazard polygons within Lillestrøm by intersecting with kommune geometry

4.description: Select 1km grid cells that intersect Lillestrøm municipality

5.description: Find parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons (parcel to quick-clay)

6.description: Assign parcel-in-quick-clay to 1km grid cells (parcel to grid)

7.description: Count parcels per grid cell and return top 5 sorted by count desc

1.description: Get kommunenummer and geometry for Lillestrøm municipality

2.description: Get parcels (properties) within Lillestrøm filtered by kommunenummer

3.description: Get quick-clay hazard areas clipped/filtered to Lillestrøm

4.description: Get 1km statistical grid cells intersecting Lillestrøm

5.description: Intersect parcels with quick-clay areas to keep only parcels in hazard zones

6.description: Spatially join parcels-in-hazard with 1km grid cells to assign each parcel to a grid cell

8.description: Sort grid cells by parcel count descending

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Lillestrøm%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT objid AS id, teigid, kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3205';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid AS id, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson, 'kartleggingsomrade' AS type
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform((SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='3205'), 25833));
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 3 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 3, "action": "query"}

3.description: Get quick-clay (kvikkleire) polygons intersecting the municipality (will embed municipality geometry literal)

4.description: Get 1km grid cells intersecting the municipality (embed municipality geometry literal)

5.description: Find parcels that fall within kvikkleire polygons (parcels ∩ kvikkleire)

6.description: Spatially join grid cells with parcels-in-kvikkleire (which parcels fall in each grid cell)

iterations.ai_content: {"query_mode":"multi_db","planned_steps":[{"step":1,"action":"query","database":"kommuner","purpose":"Get Lillestrøm municipality polygon (kommunenavn ILIKE 'Lillestrøm%')"},{"step":2,"action":"query","database":"matrikkeleneiendomskartteig","purpose":"Get parcel centroids (representasjonspunkt) for kommunenummer 3205"},{"step":3,"action":"query","database":"kvikkleire","purpose":"Get quick-clay (kvikkleire) polygons intersecting the municipality (will embed municipality geometry literal)"},{"step":4,"action":"query","database":"statistiskrutenett1km","purpose":"Get 1km grid cells intersecting the municipality (embed municipality geometry literal)"},{"step":5,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"Find parcels that fall within kvikkleire polygons (parcels ∩ kvikkleire)"},{"step":6,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"Spatially join grid cells with parcels-in-kvikkleire (which parcels fall in each grid cell)"},{"step":7,"action":"aggregate","database":null,"purpose":"Count parcels per grid cell"},{"step":8,"action":"attribute_join","database":null,"purpose":"Attach parcel counts to grid cell geometries"},{"step":9,"action":"sort","database":null,"purpose":"Sort grid cells by parcel count descending"},{"step":10,"action":"limit","database":null,"purpose":"Return top 5 grid cells"}]}

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Lillestrøm%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT objid AS id, teigid, kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3205';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT id, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('POLYGON((10.831... truncated ... 11.057))'),4326),25833));
